jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates!
